The '''Wingriders''' were a part of [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] of the [[Drall/Legends|Drall]]. They rode on [[ibbot]]s to patrol the skies of their world. Though they served a [[Police officer/Legends|security-type]] role, they also facilitated trade and communication between cities.<ref name="CatCW" />
